name: Passover Chocolate Sponge Cake
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated rind of 1 Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the egg yolks and sugar together until light and fluffy (about 7 minutes).
3. Add cold water, orange juice, orange rind, chocolate, and matzo cake flour to the egg yolk mixture.
4. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Pour the batter into a 10-inch tube pan with removable insert.
6. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes or until the cake springs back when gently pressed.
7. Cool completely, inverted on a cake rack, before removing from the pan.
